with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:

len(quran), type(quran)

type(hadith_data), list(hadith_data.keys())[:10]

targets = ["غَنِيٌّ حَمِيدٌ", "غَنِيٌ حَمِيدٌ", "غني حميد", "وَإِن تُعْرِضُوا", "وَإِن تُبْدُوا", "وَإِن تُبَذُّوا", "يَرْزُقْكُمْ", "لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ"]
def norm_ar(s):
    # remove tashkeel
    s = re.sub(r'[\u0617-\u061A\u064B-\u0652\u0657-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)
    # remove tatweel
    s = s.replace('ـ', '')
    # unify hamza forms? We'll replace some
    s = re.sub('[إأآٱ]', 'ا', s)
    s = re.sub('ى', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ؤ', 'و', s)
    s = re.sub('ئ', 'ي', s)
    s = re.sub('ة', 'ه', s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s)
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

cands = []
for rec in quran:
    at = rec['ayah_text']
    if any(t in at for t in targets):
        cands.append(rec)
len(cands)
cands
